name: Kimika
message: "Good morning, Zakuro!"
Someone behind me suddenly called out to me.

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, Kimika... You surprised me."

name: Kimika
message: "Why are you so surprised?
We agreed to meet here, you know? You shouldn't be surprised when I actually show up..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, a lot happened yesterday..."

name: Kimika
message: "But it all worked out fine. There's no need to be on edge like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe you can say that, but you're a lot stronger than me."

name: Kimika
message: "And I'll protect you, Zakuro, so don't worry!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Whoa."
Kimika hugged me as she said that.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Why are you squeezing so hard? It hurts."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha, sorry. Just looking at you makes me want to protect you. I couldn't help myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm? Why are you getting all red?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... It's nothing..."

name: Kimika
message: "Huh?"
Wh-What was that just now?
My heart skipped a beat...
Uh, but that's...

name: Zakuro
message: "I was surprised because someone suddenly called my name from behind me... Look, my heart is racing."
I put her hand on my chest.

name: Kimika
message: "Ohh, your chest, huh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What is it?"
She suddenly sighed in exasperation.

name: Kimika
message: "Nothing, it's just...
Do you really need to show your chest off? Are you trying to say, hey look at me, my chest is bigger than yours?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why would I do that?!"

name: Kimika
message: "All of you keep talking about boobs, boobs... You, and him yesterday."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... Are you still upset about what Mamiya-kun said yesterday?"

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Why would I care about him?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I only said the word chest once, and then you said something about yesterday..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmph!"
Kimika got bright red in the face and looked away.

name: Zakuro
message: "H-Huh? Did... Did I upset you?"

name: Kimika
message: "O-Oh, really... So you think I care about anything that jerk said...
That's what your pretty little mouth is trying to say, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Aah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, ah, that hurts! Thtop! Thtop pinthing me..."
She laughed like it was all a joke, but she pinched hard enough that it really hurt.

name: Zakuro
message: "That was mean. That really hurt!"

name: Kimika
message: "Then you shouldn't say things that don't need to be said."

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez, and you don't need all this fat, either!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimika
message: "What's with these boobs? You don't need all this fat! Why do you have all this fat in one spot? Is this where you store all that water for when you're crossing the desert?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?! Are you talking about a camel's hump?"

name: Kimika
message: "You don't need all this fat if you're not storing water!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-It's not like I chose to make them this way!"

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez! This is a democracy! We should all be equal! In a way, you've been hogging all the nutrition that should've gone to my chest! Give me at least half!"

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you talking about? Wait, Kimika! Ah, ah, aah!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
Kimika suddenly stopped groping my breasts.
Like she just realized what she was doing...

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "A-Ahaha... Nothing. I just figured I could help you relax. That should be enough."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You don't need to do that to help me relax!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha... Maybe you could say I took a load off your chest?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Jeez... You're acting like a perverted old man."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha... I'm just a nasty little girl, after all."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, whatever. Let's go to school."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah. Let's go."
Though I really didn't want to go.
The classroom seems like a battlefield... Though, now that I think about it, it's always kind of felt like a battlefield.
There were always so many landmines I could step on if I said the wrong thing... I always had to be careful and pick just the right words.
Watching their reactions...
If I'm not careful, I'll step on one of the mines.
That's what the classroom has always been like for the two of us.
Though now the landmines and bullets might be real. Someone could actually end up getting hurt.
There's no guarantee we'll be safe at the end of the day.
So, honestly... I just want to run away.
But...

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't run any longer."

name: Zakuro
message: "But... 'Who fights ever hoping for success?'"

name: Zakuro
message: "'I fought for lost cause, and for fruitless quest!'"

name: Kimika
message: "Is that more Cyrano? You sure like that play."
Kimika said that resignedly.

name: Kimika
message: "Literature won't help you defeat your enemies... You need chemistry and physics to do that!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe, but literature never loses."

name: Kimika
message: "Never?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Literature won't help you win, but it can ensure that you'll never lose."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's why I can still fight today."
Kimika looked at me blankly.
Her cheeks looked kind of red, too.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What is it? Say something."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, uh...
I was just thinking, you haven't fought at all yet, so why are you saying all that..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... I guess you're right. It's just been you protecting me so far. I don't have the right to say anything like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "But?"

name: Kimika
message: "You were the one who gave me the conviction to fight."

name: Kimika
message: "If you hadn't taken my hand and run... I would've never been able to fight."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "So... You're exactly right."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't like pompous crap like literature or poems or whatever, but it was really cool listening to you say that to them."

name: Kimika
message: "But... 'Who fights ever hoping for success? I fought for lost cause, and for fruitless quest!'"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? You memorized it too?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, no,
just that one part. I was sort of interested, so I flipped through it when I went to the library."

name: Kimika
message: "I was interested in the book you liked so much... or rather, the book Mamiya Takuji picked out for you, so..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You still don't trust him?"

name: Kimika
message: "Of course not. He's my enemy."

name: Kimika
message: "No buts... He's an enemy. I have to fight him."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika..."

A moment after she started walking, her face hardened and she looked down, as if she was thinking intently about something. I held her hand and guided her since she wasn't looking where she was going.

name: Kimika
message: "Last night, I was thinking about what would happen today. The teachers will probably search the students' belonging..."
She was silent for a moment, and then she looked up at me. There wasn't the slightest hint of cheer in her face.

name: Zakuro
message: "Because of what happened yesterday?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah. Senagawa confiscated my stun gun, remember?"

name: Kimika
message: "I told her it was a cell phone, but if a teacher who knew anything about electronics saw it, they would be able to tell what it was instantly."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... I see..."

name: Kimika
message: "So we can't bring weapons in through the front gate."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... Got it."
Just as expected, we couldn't pass through the gate like normal. There were several teachers searching the bags and pockets of all the students coming into the school.

name: Zakuro
message: "So then, will you be all right, Kimika?"

name: Kimika
message: "I expected this to happen, so I didn't bring anything that's obviously made to be used as a weapon. What about you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Me? The only thing I have that might be a weapon would be... a foot long acrylic ruler?"

name: Kimika
message: "Okay, good. I don't know what we would've done if you had brought something to defend yourself with."
As expected, the teachers all tensed up as we approached the school gate. Several of them looked at each other, and then they took me and Kimika aside to search us.

name: Male Teacher
message: "Hmm... She doesn't have anything unusual on her. Okay, you can go."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you."
I opened my bag and showed them the inside, then turned my pockets inside out to show I didn't have anything in them. I got through the gate surprisingly easily.
The real problem was Kimika, who was surrounded by several teachers...
It's hard to imagine that she would come to school empty-handed after the fight with Akasaka-san and Kitami-san yesterday.
She said she saw this coming, but will she really be okay?

name: Kimika
message: "This is everything. Or would you like to feel around in my skirt pockets too?"

name: Male Teacher
message: "No, we won't go that far... How's her bag look?"

name: Female Teacher
message: "There's nothing here that she wouldn't be able to bring into the school... Hmm."
It's like they were aiming for her from the beginning... They seemed disappointed since they hadn't found any evidence.

name: Kimika
message: "So can I go now?"

name: Male Teacher
message: "Yeah, but don't make any trouble."
Thankfully, she was released. She smiled and ran toward me.
She mouthed the words "fooled them," silently announcing her victory.

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez, those pacifists don't understand anything."

name: Zakuro
message: "But Kimika... if you made it through, does that mean you don't have anything to defend yourself with?"

name: Kimika
message: "It'll be fine. I thought ahead. You don't need to worry about anything."

name: Kimika
message: "But more importantly, look."
Kimika frowned and looked up at the school building. I followed her gaze.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah."
In the spot where Kimika was looking... Akasaka-san and Kitami-san were looking down at us from above.

name: Kimika
message: "I'll show them. They won't be able to look down on us like that for much longer."
Their eyes were cold and ruthless, but their mouths were curved in disgusting smiles, like they were anticipating the festivities that were about to start.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hmph!"
But I glared right back at them.
I won't give in to them... I'll fight.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha...
That's the first time I've ever seen you glare at someone. So you can put on a scary face too."

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course I can... I'm human too. Of course I can feel anger."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right."
Kimika smiled joyfully.
The moment we entered the classroom...
It instantly went from noisy to as silent as the grave.
And... sharp gazes were leveled at us.
Much worse than yesterday... It felt incredibly uncomfortable.
The classroom wasn't just a metaphorical battlefield. It had transformed into a literal one after yesterday's events.
So it would be a lie to say I was unaffected, but nevertheless, I walked toward my seat unflinchingly.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, wait a sec."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"
When I was about to pull the chair out and sit down, Kimika stopped me and started checking the desk and the chair.

name: Kimika
message: "Okay, looks fine."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you."
After she made sure my seat was safe to sit in, she checked her own seat and then sat down.

name: Megu
message: "Hey, everyone, do you smell that?"

name: Satoko
message: "You're right. It smells awful."

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, friggin' stinks. I wonder what smells."

name: Satoko
message: "I wonder, I wonder. We need to put a lid on whatever it is."
The other students were frozen like statues. Megu and Satoko exaggeratedly held their noses as they walked around the classroom.

name: Megu
message: "Whew, it stinks. This isn't funny."

name: Satoko
message: "This is totally rotten... Ugh, it's stinging my nose."

name: Megu
message: "Does anyone have rotten bread in their desk?"
They held their noses like pigs and walked around... Then, as if they were planning it from the beginning, they moved toward our desks.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, sorry... This might be what stinks..."
Kimika's relaxed voice echoed in the strained atmosphere of the classroom.
Kimika smiled as she stood up and pulled a test tube from her bag.

name: Megu
message: "Ah!"
In that instant, they stopped in their tracks.

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What is that... Wait."
There wasn't any smell coming from the test tube at all... Of course not. They were just making it all up.
Their faces grew paler and paler by the moment.

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows, what could it be... Haven't you already heard from Shiroyama?"

name: Megu
message: "Ah... You mean, that's..."

name: Kimika
message: "What a brilliant deduction!
Naturally, you would be sensitive to his body odor, since you're his girlfriend."
Megu looked like she was about to jump on Kimika, but she didn't. She kept her distance since she knew what was in the test tube.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I'm terribly sorry. This stinks so bad, you must not have been able to fuck your boyfriend last night, huh... Hehehe, sorry about that."

name: Kimika
message: "How mad was he that he didn't get any last night? He must be pissed... Oh, scary, scary."

name: Satoko
message: "Don't get cocky, you little―"

name: Megu
message: "Knock it off, Satoko. You really don't want to get that stuff on you."

name: Satoko
message: "Ugh!"
After Megu told her to stop, Satoko didn't dare get any closer to Kimika. She just stood next to Megu, looking disgusted.

name: Megu
message: "They searched all your stuff at the gate this morning... How did you get that in?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that. You've spent so much time with me, and you still don't know anything about me.
That's too bad..."

name: Kimika
message: "You know, I'm in the track and field club, but I'm also the leader of a club that was nearly abolished."
Oh, that's right...
I haven't ever heard of the club doing anything, so I forgot, but Kimika's in two clubs. I never knew she was the leader, though.

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Tachibana Kimika, the 39th leader of Kita High's Science Club... And don't you forget it.
Hehehe."

name: Satoko
message: "Science Club?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why would the teachers be surprised that someone in the science club had a test tube? Do you really think they would confiscate a test tube with decarbonated, deaminated protein in it?"

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "Would you understand if I said they were rotten amino acids?"

name: Megu
message: "R-Rotten?"

name: Kimika
message: "Maybe sulfuric or hydrochloric acid would, but there's no way amino acids would attract undue attention. They won't hurt anyone. They just stink... It's the smell of rotting meat."
The two of them glared at her vehemently as they stood there.

name: Kimika
message: "Now then, there's something else that passed inspection over here."

name: Kimika
message: "It looks like nothing more than a bottle of disinfectant spray!"

name: Kimika
message: "It's easy to carry, and the spray nozzle has to be turned before it can be sprayed, so it's not likely to leak."

name: Kimika
message: "But...
say the contents happened to be highly alkaline sodium hydroxide..."

name: Megu
message: "Sodium hydroxide?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, sodium hydroxide is traditionally stored in a plastic container... It's both a solid and a solution. It should be kept in a plastic or rubber container, not a glass one."

name: Kimika
message: "In other words, it would be possible to put sodium hydroxide in a container like this."

name: Megu
message: "So what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Now, just what would happen if I sprayed sodium hydroxide in here..."

name: Kimika
message: "If it got on any valuable rings or necklaces... it would eat away at the metal."

name: Kimika
message: "But it would be even worse if you sprayed it on a person...
I wonder what would happen then."

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What would happen?"
Megu's voice cracked as she asked the question. The smile disappeared from Kimika's face.

name: Kimika
message: "If you were to spray it in someone's shoes... the person who put those shoes on would first start to feel something slimy."

name: Kimika
message: "Then it would start to itch... and then it would turn into intense pain."

name: Kimika
message: "This is because sodium hydroxide would dissolve the keratin in your skin, turning it into a slimy substance. After a while, it'll eat away so much of your skin that it'll turn to pain... It'll eat right through your skin."

name: Kimika
message: "And if it was sprayed on someone's face... If it happened to get in your eyes, you could lose your sight permanently if you didn't get to the hospital fast enough."

name: Kimika
message: "The point is, if this gets on your skin, it'll fry your skin cells.
Pretty scary, huh? It's not something for an amateur to play around with."
She happily threatened them with her explanation. The two of them couldn't say a word.
When I looked around, I didn't feel the same pressure from the rest of the class either.
None of them liked Megu or Satoko either, so they were all silently snickering as they watched.
Kimika took another test tube from her bag.
It was different from the others. There was a partition in the middle for some reason, with mysterious white powder on both sides of the partition.

name: Kimika
message: "Why do you think these two powders... have to be separated?"

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What is that... You mean it would be bad if they were mixed?"

name: Kimika
message: "Something bad, huh... I wonder if it'd be that easy to buy two substances that'd be dangerous if mixed together..."
After that, she chuckled to herself so silently that it was almost inaudible.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, but what if it was, for instance, calcium hypochlorite... In other words, bleaching powder."

name: Kimika
message: "It's incredibly common here in the school, since they use it to disinfect the pool water."

name: Kimika
message: "And, this could be ammonium chloride. Until just recently, you could get this at any convenience store... Now you need a license to buy it, but there are still plenty of people who have some just lying around."

name: Kimika
message: "Ammonium chloride is used in fertilizer, as a food additive, in dyes, and plenty of other stuff, so there are plenty of people who can get their hands on it... Oh right, it's also one of the ingredients in gunpowder."

name: Kimika
message: "When mixed with calcium hypochlorite, it becomes an exceptionally unstable substance... With just a little shock, it goes...
kaboom!"

name: Megu
message: "Eek!"

name: Kimika
message: "A stun gun doesn't even compare to this... The mixture of these two substances is essentially an explosive."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, and it's fairly easy to acquire potassium chloride. If you boil a battery to get sulfuric acid and then combine the two... Oh, that would explode too, wouldn't it?"

name: Megu
message: "Y-You brought all that into school?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? No, I haven't...
I thought we were just having a conversation about substances that are dangerous to mix together."

name: Kimika
message: "Would you like to test out my theory? If I throw this test tube, the contents will mix, and then..."

name: Kimika
message: "Boom!"

name: Megu
message: "Eek!"
As Kimika's voice grew more and more ominous, Megu's face, caked with makeup, tightened into an ugly frown.

name: Megu
message: "Fuck, what were those teachers doing... They let her bring that crap in?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, your father is the chairman. I figured this would be the first thing you would try. I saw straight through your plan."
The classroom was completely silent.
All eyes were on the vial in Kimika's hand.
If it really is an explosive... that means everyone in this room is in danger.
A brusque voice ripped through the silence.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Is that bitch Tachibana here?!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, so he's shown up..."

name: Megu
message: "Tsubasa?"
A male student that hardly ever shows up in the classroom suddenly burst in, frothing with rage. Even his girlfriend, Megu, was visibly afraid of him.

name: Shiroyama
message: "I hope you haven't forgotten about yesterday!"

name: Kimika
message: "What on earth are you talking about... Of course I haven't. My maidenhood was in danger for a second there."
The other students, who were trying to ignore the tussle before, all gulped in unison when they saw Shiroyama, but Kimika didn't flinch.

name: Shiroyama
message: "What, you think I won't hit a fucking girl? Bitch, you have about three seconds to get over here and lick the dog shit off my shoes!"
His eyes lit up with anger. He looked like he was about to punch her.

name: Kimika
message: "Hmph, it's only natural that men are supposed to be kind to women... You're not a gentlemen at all, Shiroyama-kun."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, and I have a few new toys. Would you like to try them out? I'm sure it'd be a thrill."
Kimika held the tube with the divider in it up to eye level and waved it back and forth in front of him, challenging him to do something.

name: Shiroyama
message: "The fuck does that matter?! There's no way you're gonna hit me with that shit when I can see it coming!"

name: Female Student
message: "Ah!"
Shiroyama flipped over a desk to intimidate Kimika, completely ignoring the person sitting at it.
Kimika just smiled...

name: Kimika
message: "Quit your barking... If that's what you think, why don't you go ahead and hit me? What good does it do to flip a desk or two? Dumbass."

name: Shiroyama
message: "You little bitch!"

name: Megu
message: "Whoa, Tsubasa, stop!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Don't get in my way. I'm gonna break her fucking jaw!"

name: Megu
message: "All right! All right already!"
Shiroyama brushed Megu away and kicked another desk over.

name: Shiroyama
message: "You know the shit I went through yesterday because of her!"

name: Megu
message: "I know, but please, just hold yourself back for now!"
He struggled with her, almost looking like he was about to hit her too, but she managed to hold him back.

name: Megu
message: "That test tube isn't the same as yesterday!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Shut up. That doesn't matter!"

name: Megu
message: "It does! It might explode if it breaks!"

name: Megu
message: "It'll be way worse than yesterday! It'll be way worse than a few holes in your shirt!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "The fuck did you..."
When she told him that, the tension in his body slowly faded, though the look of malice never left his face.

name: Megu
message: "Look at her... She's not scared at all, even after all those threats. If she was bullshitting us, there's no way she would be so calm!"

name: Megu
message: "I'm worried about you getting hurt, but more importantly, if there was an explosion here, the police would get called. Even I couldn't protect you if that happened. Do you understand?"
If the police were called, it would be a blemish on our records as well, but it would be much worse for Shiroyama, since he's been arrested several times before.
He hadn't given in, but he had no choice but to stand his ground and stare menacingly at Kimika once Megu let him go.

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehehehe..."
Kimika, one of the smallest people in the room, stood in the center of the tense classroom and giggled.

name: Kimika
message: "Dummy, dummy, ahahahaha..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Wha―"

name: Megu
message: "Forget it! Homeroom is about to start, so you need to leave!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "B-But that bitch..."

name: Megu
message: "You can do whatever you want later. If you pull something here, you're gonna be the one who takes the fall."

name: Shiroyama
message: "...Fucking hell. After she said all that... Remember this, you little shit: I'm going to kill you!"
He left without doing what he came for. It was a huge relief to see him him skulk off into the hallway, muttering complaints to himself.

name: Kimika
message: "...Ahahahaha."
Kimika's laughter echoed in the silent classroom.
Everyone was afraid of the person who, until recently, had been the weakest person in the room.

name: Teacher
message: "Martin Luther was a religious reformer who challenged the authority of the Catholic church..."
I was able to participate in class normally, since I had copied Kimika's textbook yesterday, but...
Megu glared daggers at us throughout the entire class.

name: Teacher
message: "He wrote many hymnals, translated the New Testament from Latin to German, and accomplished many other things in his life..."
But Kimika didn't even seem to notice. She just paid attention to class, highlighting important parts in her textbook.
"No matter what happens, don't let them get to you."
"Even if it's just acting, you can't show them weakness."
Kimika told me that over and over while we were on our way to school, but... I can't stay calm like her.
She really is amazing.
When morning classes ended, Megu and Satoko left the classroom. The other students started moving their desks together to eat with their friends.
And of course... I probably don't even need to say it, but they all turned their backs toward us and ignored us as they ate.
Kimika moved her desk over next to mine.

name: Kimika
message: "We survived morning classes, huh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, we did..."

name: Kimika
message: "I was having so much fun showing off my toys, too. Tough crowd, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course. They're all afraid of Akasaka-san and Shiroyama-kun."

name: Kimika
message: "So they ignored us? What cowards."
They're not cowards... Not everyone can be as strong as you, Kimika.
Not everyone has so many weapons to defend themselves from violence.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hey, do you want to eat somewhere else? I don't feel very comfortable here."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that might be nice... Those bitches over there are staring at me."

name: Satoko
message: "The fuck did you say?!"

name: Kimika
message: "What?"

name: Megu
message: "Knock it off, Satoko..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, sorry, sorry... I guess I didn't need to say that, ahaha..."

name: Kimika
message: "Let's go then?"
Kimika smiled agreeably and then moved her desk back to its original position with her skinny arms.

name: Kimika
message: "So where do you want to go eat?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Somewhere no one else is. Somewhere wide open, not penned in..."

name: Kimika
message: "The field?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, no... I was thinking about the rooftop."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, the rooftop, huh? If you want, I'll follow you to the ends of the earth."

name: Zakuro
message: "What do you mean by that... Well, if that's fine with you, then let's go."
I smiled at her and nodded. We went to the vending machine to buy some milk first, then headed to the rooftop.

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa, it's hot!"
The Building A rooftop gets way hotter during the day than I thought.

name: Kimika
message: "Do you really want to eat up here, Zakuro? At this rate, they're going to find two dried out corpses on the roof tomorrow."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, that's why no one else comes here."

name: Kimika
message: "So you knew it would be like this."

name: Zakuro
message: "It'll be okay... Let's go."

name: Kimika
message: "Go where?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, wow... This rooftop is a lot cooler."

name: Zakuro
message: "The angle of the sun and the way the wind blows through make this spot a lot cooler."

name: Mamiya
message: "...You again?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... Excuse me."
Mamiya-kun frowned when he saw me, and then he shook his head back and forth like he was denying something.

name: Kimika
message: "So why are you here?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's my line... Why are you two here?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... sorry, but would you mind if we stayed here for a little while too?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm, then what about her? Her attitude doesn't make me want to do her any favors."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro and I will be eating here... You need to get out."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why do I need to leave? I was here first."

name: Kimika
message: "Would you rather I forcibly removed you? I still haven't gotten you back for last time..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So you have more toys hidden away, huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I figured I'd beat you with a police baton or pepper spray, so..."

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika! U-Um, Mamiya-kun, I'm so sorry!"

name: Kimika
message: "Why are you apologizing, Zakuro?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, well... common sense says that we're the ones who should be apologizing right now..."

name: Kimika
message: "He's deceiving you!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... It's not like anyone owns this spot...
If you want to hang out, then go ahead. If you want to pick a fight with me, then I'll play along with that too."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... I'll take you up on that offer."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ugh!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Apologize!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? B-But, uh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "No! You're the one at fault here! Apologize!"

name: Kimika
message: "B-But... I-I didn't..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun, I'm so sorry... Come on, Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Why do I have to do that? I-I was doing it for your sake..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Come on!"
Kimika looked like she was about to cry... And she looked so strong when she was arguing with Megu and Satoko just a moment ago, too...

name: Kimika
message: "Do you like him that much?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "You're gonna choose him over me?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Waaah! I'm trying so hard, too!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I can't handle this. So loud..."

name: Kimika
message: "Shut up! Quit acting all high and mighty! This is a duel! Duel me!"

name: Mamiya
message: "If you really want to fight, go ahead and try to hit me... I'm not going to lose to an amateur like you."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Wh-What did you say?!
You cocky little brat!"

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Wait, what are you doing with that?! That's the one you said would explode!"

name: Kimika
message: "Don't stop me, Zakuro! I'm going to kill him!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... You know...
your boobs might grow if you learn to act like a lady."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Th-The fuck did you just say?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I said, if you learn to act like a nice girl like Takashima over there, your boobs will probably grow too."

name: Mamiya
message: "Girls hormones can get messed up when they cuss all the time. That's why you don't have any boobs..."

name: Kimika
message: "That's just superstition! You think you're all smart and shit. Go find me the book where you read that crap! Show me your data! Where's your bibliography?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Kimika, calm down."

name: Kimika
message: "But, but, Zakuro!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?"
I gently embraced Kimika.
When she gets worked up like this...
She looks like a little puppy.
So I wondered if she would calm down if I hugged her, just like I do with puppies...

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, Z-Zakuro..."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's all right... No one ever said that he's more important than you are."

name: Kimika
message: "So then, does that mean you like me more?"

name: Zakuro
message: "N-No... That's not the problem here..."

name: Mamiya
message: "What's wrong with you two... Are you practicing some comedy routine? Are you two gonna become stand up comedians after graduation?"

name: Kimika
message: "You're the stupid one here, not me!
I'm gonna go to a first rate university! Then I'll be a mad scientist when I grow up! And if that doesn't work out, a NEET!"

name: Mamiya
message: "...Your dreams are retarded."

name: Kimika
message: "What?!
Don't make fun of mad scientists!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Why would you want to be a NEET?!"

name: Kimika
message: "What?! Don't make fun of NEETs!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Come on, Kimika... Let's eat already. Lunchtime is going to end if we keep this up."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh! You're right..."

name: Kimika
message: "Tch...
Fine. Mamiya Takuji, I don't want to waste Zakuro's precious time, so I'll postpone your execution."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really... Glad to hear it."
Kimika immediately sat down and got her lunchbox out of her bag.
I sat down next to her and looked over at Mamiya-kun. He didn't complain or glare, but just ignored us instead.

name: Kimika
message: "Hey, trade me your fried eggs for my hamburger like we did yesterday."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sure. Your hamburgers are really good."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehe..."
Mamiya-kun suddenly laughed when we opened our lunchboxes and started trading food back and forth.

name: Kimika
message: "What do you want? I hope you don't expect me to give you any."

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't want any... Hehehe."

name: Kimika
message: "What's so funny?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Nothing... I just didn't see you as the motherly type. I was laughing because you made such cute little shapes with it."

name: Kimika
message: "What's funny about that?! Dumbass!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika, come on..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You shouldn't say that either, Mamiya-kun. Kimika is pretty good at cooking."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, so you're really gonna eat it? It probably has a bomb in it."

name: Kimika
message: "I'd be happy to put a bomb in yours..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, have you had lunch yet? You could have some of mine."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I―"

name: Kimika
message: "No way!
Didn't your parents ever tell you not to feed wild animals?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika, I just told you... You shouldn't say things like that."
Mamiya-kun ignored her completely as he fished through his pocket.
Then he looked disappointed.

name: Mamiya
message: "Tch... They're all gone. I was the one who bought those, too... It must have been Yuki."

name: Zakuro
message: "What were you looking for?"
He looked even more restless than before.

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm out of cigarettes."

name: Zakuro
message: "Cigarettes?! Y-Y-You can't do that! That's not good for you!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really... Well, good."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not good at all."

name: Kimika
message: "What? You want some cigarettes?
Here."
As she finished chewing her food, she pulled her bag closer and grabbed a small white box.

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh... Eeh?!"
I jumped when I saw her pull cigarettes out of the last place I would've expected them.

name: Zakuro
message: "Why do you have those? Wait, Kimika, you don't smoke, do you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Don't worry about it...
So, do you want them?"
She dodged my question and held out the box to Mamiya-kun. The cigarettes all had feminine designs printed on them.

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't like that minty crap."

name: Kimika
message: "So you don't want them?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I didn't say that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, so you do want them? Then I'll give them to you... Here."
He took one cigarette from the box, put it in his mouth, and lit it with an austere metal lighter.
Flick.
His face softened as he exhaled the white smoke.

name: Kimika
message: "What a dumbass... You know that stuff's not good for you..."

name: Mamiya
message: "...You're the one who had them in the first place."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't smoke them... They're poison."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then why did you have them?"

name: Kimika
message: "The nicotine in tobacco leaves is useful for a lot of things."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... What would you do with that?"

name: Kimika
message: "You could put it on a desk or a doorknob... It's possible to make almost anyone confused and light headed with it."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-By lots of things, you just meant making people confused?"
Bang, flash, boom!

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"
The burning tobacco suddenly flared up and started exploding like a firework.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahaha."

name: Mamiya
message: "Owch―?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What's happening?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Pthoo! Ow, ow, ow! What the hell is this?!"
Even Mamiya-kun couldn't stay cool after that. It looked like he kept it in his mouth and endured the heat for a moment because he didn't want to spit it out.

name: Kimika
message: "Gotcha!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I-Is this a prank?"

name: Kimika
message: "I pulled the tobacco out of that cigarette and put nitrocellulose in the second half.

name: Kimika
message: "And I used magnesium powder so it would flash brighter."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see... So the menthol was there to disguise the smell of the explosives. Now that's something..."
He wore an expression of utter resignation as he crushed the box of cigarettes.

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you okay? You're not burnt, are you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, I should've seen it coming..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So why would you make something like this?"

name: Kimika
message: "For you, of course... What would it accomplish if I gave these to Shiroyama?"

name: Mamiya
message: "So what were you trying to accomplish with this?"

name: Kimika
message: "I was trying to get revenge!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Revenge for what?"

name: Kimika
message: "What?!
'Revenge for what?'
The fuck is wrong with you?! How can you say that after what you did yesterday?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What I did yesterday? What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "Anyway, give me back my Extreme Ratio BF2 Tactical Tanto, right now!"

name: Mamiya
message: "No way."

name: Kimika
message: "Why not?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I told you, those were my reparations. You're the one who attacked me with a knife, after all."

name: Kimika
message: "Then give me back my Colt Government M1911A1!"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's part of the reparations too."

name: Kimika
message: "Huh?
What kind of dumbass would want a Tanto and a M1911 for reparations?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "The dumbass standing in front of you."

name: Kimika
message: "Why, you!!
That's your friggin' answer?!"
Her entire body shook with anger. She took one step forward and locked eyes with Mamiya-kun.

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, this knife is pretty well built for a folding knife. The blade is thick and just long enough. It feels nice just holding it..."
Mamiya-kun pulled the knife out.

name: Kimika
message: "Of course! It's the one I picked out!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What's the blade made of?"

name: Kimika
message: "N690 Cobalt Stainless Steel."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, it's not even ATS-34?"

name: Kimika
message: "Shut up you nouveau rich bastard! Only trust fund babies have knives like that!"

name: Mamiya
message: "But those knives are higher quality."

name: Kimika
message: "They're not better! Function over form!"

name: Zakuro
message: "...What? Huh?"
What? What are they talking about?
I felt really lonely, like I had been excluded from something.

name: Mamiya
message: "You modified that Colt with a backless rear sight, an extended thumb safety, and a straight grip stock, didn't you?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. I put a lot of money into that! The grip safety is a beavertail, too!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm, I see... Those certainly are very practical modifications...
Not bad."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm not giving it to you
just because you gave me a compliment or two!"

name: Kimika
message: "I've been shooting for a long time. I love my Colt."

name: Kimika
message: "If I'm gonna use a gun, then it has to have a magazine and a thin frame like the M1911."
She got really happy for a second when he complimented her gun, but then her face turned sour and she started yelling at him again.

name: Kimika
message: "Anyway, please give it back already! I put so much of my allowance into that!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Sucks to be you, huh? I'll be sure to take good care of it for you."

name: Kimika
message: "Stop fucking with me!
I can't sleep at night unless I have a gun and a knife under my pillow!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really... Why don't you try some Vick's VapoRub instead?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm not a baby! Why would I need something like that to help me sleep?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "N-Now, now... Let's calm down, Kimika."
We must have gotten on his nerves. He got up and started to walk away.
And I thought all three of us would be able to eat together for once. What a shame.

name: Kimika
message: "What? Are you running away?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I guess so."

name: Kimika
message: "And you're gonna admit it? Where are your balls?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... You know,
you really should try being a little more ladylike... You're never going to find a husband at this rate."

name: Kimika
message: "What do I need a husband for?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, at this rate, you'll definitely grow old without ever finding a husband."

name: Kimika
message: "What?!
Just how low are you gonna stoop?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, if that's what you want..."
Mamiya-kun kicked the box of cigarettes and slowly walked toward the stairs.

name: Hasaki
message: "H-Hello."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "H-Hello..."
Hasaki-chan looked at me and bowed politely. Then she stood in front of Mamiya-kun and blocked his path.

name: Hasaki
message: "So you really were up here, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... Who are you calling Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... Nii-san..."
For some reason she looked at us and then changed the way she addressed him... But now that I think of it, why would she call Mamiya Takuji-kun, "Tomo Nii-san"?

name: Hasaki
message: "Here, I packed lunch for you."
She thrust the wrapped package at him before he could say no.

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't want to eat right now. Take it back home."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I-I'm on a diet..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That must be it... It's because there are people around, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-What is?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san, you always try to look cool, so you don't want them to see you eating your little sister's packed lunch."

name: Mamiya
message: "Wha―"

name: Kimika
message: "Heh, is she right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "As if!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then why? You haven't eaten yet."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I ate earlier."

name: Zakuro
message: "He hasn't eaten yet."

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-Why you, Takashima!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought so..."

name: Hasaki
message: "All right... Please, just eat it so it doesn't go to waste."

name: Kimika
message: "Are you gonna let a little girl talk to you like that?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Shut up!"

name: Kimika
message: "Wow... Did you make all of this, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes... I don't know if it tastes that good, though..."
The lunchbox Hasaki-chan had brought was so large and garish that we were both surprised. Our lunchboxes looked pathetic by comparison.

name: Hasaki
message: "If you two would like some..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't feed the wild animals."

name: Kimika
message: "What?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's the same thing you said earlier..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh... Then I can't have any either?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't need his permission... He didn't want it anyway."

name: Mamiya
message: "B-But that was..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay, okay... Everyone, please go ahead and eat."

name: Kimika
message: "How can two siblings be so different?
Why does this piece of trash have such a wonderful little sister?"
We all sat under the blue sky and shared a noisy meal together. Kimika and I had to wipe the smiles off our faces and put on stoic expressions when we walked back into the classroom.
It was practically expected at this point. The moment we walked into the room all conversation stopped and everyone looked uneasy.
I took a deep breath and walked to my seat. I checked the chair and the desk before sitting down, just like Kimika told me to.
Nothing wrong with them...
I was worried they would do something, but they didn't try anything during class.
Though they glared at us all throughout the class...
Kimika yawned out of boredom... Though that must be a bluff... But then...

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm, mmm..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?!"
She's really sleeping!
Soon, afternoon classes ended too.

name: Kimika
message: "Now then... Let's go home, shall we?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I know, I know..."
If they were going to come after us today, it would be after school... The walk home is the most dangerous part of the day.
There are lots of places they could wait to ambush us... and if we waited around after school, it would just get darker and more dangerous.

name: Kimika
message: "Well, I doubt anything will happen before we leave school, at least."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah, probably..."
They had already had plenty of chances to attack us if they wanted to do it here at school.
If they were going to do something, it would happen after we left the school gates.

name: Kimika
message: "Which means... once we leave, you can't let your guard down even for an instant."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Of course..."

name: Kimika
message: "All right then... Let's go home. Carefully."
Splat.

name: Zakuro
message: "I guess we were wrong..."
As soon as we stepped outside, we heard a strange whizzing sound for a moment, and then a second later we were covered in broken eggs.

name: Kimika
message: "We let our guard down, huh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "These are rotten eggs, aren't they? They must have been waiting for us to come out."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, an egg or two is better than a brick or a flower vase."
We looked up at the roof, but we couldn't see anyone up there.

name: Kimika
message: "Damn it... This is the oldest trick in the book..."
These white uniforms are pretty expensive, so that was actually really bad...

name: Zakuro
message: "Anyway, let's go wash our hair and faces, then we can go change in the locker room. We can't go home like this."

name: Kimika
message: "Do you have a change of clothes?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, my P.E. clothes..."
Everyone watched us as we walked over to the water supply and washed our hair and faces with soap. We went to the locker room right away when we were done.

name: Zakuro
message: "What?! My locker door is broken?"
My locker had been bent into a strange rectangular shape.

name: Kimika
message: "We should've been more careful... There was plenty of time for them to do this, since they didn't want to do anything to us directly after what happened this morning."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... but I never expected them to drop eggs on us."

name: Kimika
message: "I should've seen this coming... This isn't just my problem anymore."

name: Kimika
message: "I decided I was going to protect you, so I can't mess up like this. If something happened to you, just saying sorry wouldn't fix it."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But I should be able to help you too..."

name: Kimika
message: "You dummy. You were the one who saved me..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "I was the one who was always bullied by everyone in the class, and you were the one who saved me. I still haven't repaid my debt to you..."

name: Kimika
message: "So I'll protect you, no matter what happens."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika..."
Her locker was fine, maybe because it was locked. My locker, on the other hand, was almost comically warped, since I didn't expect them to attack us like this and never locked it.
The only thing left in my locker was a swimsuit. I don't know if that was an act of kindness or yet another form of bullying.
Did they want to laugh at me walking home in a swimsuit?

name: Zakuro
message: "Just a school swimsuit..."

name: Kimika
message: "You have a pretty nice figure. Why don't you just wear that home?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why would I do that?!"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm joking... I guess we'll have to wait until our uniforms dry. That's probably what they wanted, though..."

name: Zakuro
message: "What they wanted?"

name: Kimika
message: "At night, they can do whatever they want without getting caught... That's probably why."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then we should go home right now..."

name: Kimika
message: "The curtain of night doesn't play favorites. They're not the only ones who can move more freely at night."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Really?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, so let's wait until our uniforms dry... Besides, there's something we can do while we're waiting."

name: Zakuro
message: "While we're waiting?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah... My locker's awfully tough, isn't it?"
When she opened up her locker... There was something almost the same size inside it.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What's this? Why do you have a safe in your locker?"

name: Kimika
message: "The locker is made of thin steel, so I put a sturdy safe inside it..."

name: Kimika
message: "And inside of that..."
She pulled out a lot of different chemicals.
Where does she keep her P.E. clothes?
I was kind of curious about that, but...

name: Zakuro
message: "It's definitely nighttime now..."

name: Kimika
message: "But we're dry at least."

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa... That's right."
The sun set as we hid and waited for our uniforms to dry.

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Haa... I was waiting for you. You must have a lot of free time."
"Nah... It's totally dark outside."

name: Nishimura
message: "What are you doing? You shouldn't be in the school this late at night... It's pitch black outside..."

name: Iida
message: "We're all afraid of the dark... It's dangerous, you know?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm, that's a bit odd... Well, I was ready for this anyway... or rather..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Kimika...?"
I was confused by her actions. She put her hand up her skirt and started feeling around for something on her waist.

name: Nishimura
message: "What? Are you going to strip naked and beg for forgiveness?"

name: Kimika
message: "You're so naive..."

name: Nishimura
message: "Agh, ow, fuck, ow!"

name: Kimika
message: "It hurts, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "A real whip can flay the skin off your back."
The whip in her hand was clearly different from the kind used to give orders to animals or the kind used in acrobatics. It was designed to be used as a weapon.
She wrapped it around her waist like a belt and hid it under her clothes...

name: Kimika
message: "I can take you all on at once with this."

name: Iida
message: "Th-This could be bad..."

name: Iinuma
message: "I heard that a real whip can cut a beer can in half."

name: Nishimura
message: "It hurts... It fucking hurts."

name: Iida
message: "Jeez, I don't doubt it... This really hurts..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it sure looks painful!"
The sound of the whip cutting through the air gave Kimika courage and made the men back off warily.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Sure, that's scary, but either way, it's just a couple girls."

name: Shiroyama
message: "This should be fun. Let's see how long she can tangle with us!"

name: Kimika
message: "...Why, you!"
As Shiroyama moved forward unflinchingly... Kimika knocked him to the ground with the whip.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh!"
His clothes were ripped and bloody...

name: Shiroyama
message: "I-It's not that bad... Hey, guys! If we all go at the same time, we can get her easy!"

name: Iida
message: "Whoa... No way, man. You're covered in blood."

name: Nishimura
message: "God damn it... Now you've done it, you bitch. I'll rape you, I swear!"

name: Iida
message: "That's all you think about, isn't it..."

name: Iinuma
message: "She only has a whip. If we all go at once, she can't stop us. We might get hurt, but it's not like we're gonna die from it."

name: Kimika
message: "Hah!"

name: Iinuma
message: "Agh!"

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro! Run!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah!"
The sound of the whip was the signal for me to run... and then she followed right after me.

name: Shiroyama
message: "You can't run for long!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa, haa―"

name: Kimika
message: "Keep going! Get outside the school gates!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay! ―Haa, haa―"

name: Kimika
message: "Women don't like stubborn men, you know?!"
As I ran through the gate, I heard the sound of Kimika's whip behind me.
We desperately ran. She turned around once in a while to ward off our pursuers.

name: Kimika
message: "Haa― haa, haa―"
But Kimika doesn't have much stamina. She couldn't keep this up for much longer.

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa, haa, haa―!"
I grabbed her hand and pulled her along as we ran through the night streets.
There was hardly anyone around in the residential district.

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa― They're still coming―"
I heard the whip cutting through the air several more times, but the situation didn't improve at all.
What should we do? Where should we go?

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa― Are there more people than before?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why are they chasing us too... Haa, haa!"

name: Kimika
message: "It must be... haa, haa, ha, some guys Akasaka got together..."
The situation just got worse.

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa― Ah?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, Kimika!"
As she was nearing the limit of her stamina, she tripped and fell. I went down with her, rolling several times before we regained our bearings.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Haa, haa... We finally caught you, and at such a convenient place, too."

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa... I wonder about that. No one will hear us here, you know?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "That's right... No matter how much you scream, no one will hear you."
I finally saw all the people who had been chasing us. As I looked at their sheer numbers and the weapons they were holding, the blood drained from my face.
Shiroyama stood there, trying to catch his breath, with a wooden sword in his hand.
The other men had large knives, metal bats, and even steel pipes with the ends cut off.
Any of them could easily kill a person...

name: Kimika
message: "Haa... I guess you won't be satisfied till you see some blood, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, Kimika!"
Kimika, her breath still ragged from running, stood in front of me to protect me. She stared down the laughing men that were eyeing us...
Even though she was hardly able to stand.
She took several test tubes out of her bag.

name: Kimika
message: "Well then... I didn't think I'd actually get to use this..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Hehehe... Are you sure you should be holding that up like that?"

name: Kimika
message: "What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika..."
When I looked closer, I noticed that several of the men were pointing airguns at Kimika.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Which will happen first... You throwing it, or the airguns blowing it up in your hand?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "I don't know how powerful that is, but either way, you probably won't be the only one hit by the blast."

name: Shiroyama
message: "The broken glass might even hit Takashima over there..."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro! Run away from here!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "If any of you move, I'll throw it, but if you let Zakuro go..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "If we do?"

name: Kimika
message: "You can do whatever you want with me..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Hahahaha! That's your plan?! You must be great friends, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "How about it? If you don't promise to leave Zakuro alone, I'll throw it... If this hits you, you'll be in a wheelchair!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Oh, scary, scary... All right then. So you're prepared to do anything for her, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Well?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "All right... We won't touch Takashima."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Haa... You heard him.
Now run, Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "There's no way I could do that!"

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro... Don't do this...
Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Hehehe... How careless of you..."
Several men jumped out of the bushes and pinned her down.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Dumbass... As if we would do that. We're the ones giving the orders here."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Now then... How about the two of you have a little fun with every single person here?"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "You're cute when your mouth is shut. If only you'd been a good little girl and become my toy like I wanted... Too bad, huh?"
Shiroyama gave a crude smile as he pulled Kimika by the hair and held her down. He brought his face so close to hers that their lips were almost touching.

name: Shiroyama
message: "This is what you get for fucking making. me.
RUN!"
Shiroyama threw her to the ground and pushed her down into the dirt with his foot.

name: Zakuro
message: "Let her up!"
Pound, pound.
I lost control of myself, punching Shiroyama in the chest several times.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Huh? What's she doing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Stop it! You can't do such horrible things!"
Pound, pound.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ough... You little... You little..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Is she trying to hurt me? Huh? I can't even call this a massage."

name: Zakuro
message: "Grrr!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Hey Numada, I have the right to defend myself now, don't I?"

name: Iida
message: "Of course. She just punched you."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Guess I'll have to...
do this!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ugh!"
Shiroyama smirked and then punched me in the stomach. My vision instantly went black and I lost my sense of balance.
I couldn't breathe.
My entire body was numb. I couldn't move.
It was like the entire world had been shifted 45 degrees―

name: Kimika
message: "Ugh... Dummy..."
Kimika was on the ground a few feet away, looking at me and crying.
Kimika and I were looking at each other at the same angle... I must have fallen to the ground.

name: Megu
message: "Haa... What a pain in the ass..."

name: Satoko
message: "Jeez... Why couldn't you just give up?"
The hateful, disgusting, unforgettable voices of our tormentors entered our ears.
They must have been giggling as they waited somewhere safe and watched us fighting for our lives.
They looked at us and grinned.
They looked down at us with glee, as if we were idiots for even trying to resist.
But...

name: Megu
message: "Hahaha! How fucking pathetic!"

name: Satoko
message: "Oh, it looks like she can still stand."
I mustered all my strength to pull myself off the ground and stand on my own two feet.
My head was spinning, my stomach was convulsing, and I couldn't see straight.

name: Megu
message: "It's too late to apologize now."

name: Zakuro
message: "Akasaka... Megu."

name: Megu
message: "The fuck do you want?! What do you want now, bitch?!"
As if I was possessed by all the loathing and anger that had built up within me―
I forgot about the pain in my wrists long enough to lash out at Megu, but sadly she avoided my blows.

name: Zakuro
message: "Don't run away, you bitch!"

name: Megu
message: "Huh?!
What, has she lost her fucking marbles?"
Megu's voice and expression changed. She was honestly shocked.
She had me labeled as a simple, docile sheep who could never fight back. She never expected me to act like this.
That made me want to rip her face off even more―

name: Satoko
message: "Take this!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"
I was hit in the stomach even harder than before. I collapsed like a marionette whose strings had been cut.

name: Satoko
message: "What? She's so weak..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ack!"

name: Satoko
message: "What? Hey!
Fight some more!
Come on!
Come on!
Unlike Shiroyama, Satoko didn't pull her punches.
Maybe people of the same sex really can be crueler to you than those of the opposite sex...
Satoko pulled me back up and kept punching me.

name: Megu
message: "Ahahaha... This is a pretty good show."
"Yeah, I love a good show..."
"You're right... This show is great."
A voice in the dark suddenly agreed with her, followed by the sound of approaching footsteps.

name: Mamiya
message: "This is really amazing... There are so many people, too. This is really something."

name: Kimika
message: "M-Mamiya... Takuji..."

name: Mamiya
message: "By the way, could I ask who gave you permission to touch my women? Well?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Iida
message: "Huh? These women are your property?"
The men who seemed so threatening a moment ago all changed their tone and looked nervously at Mamiya-kun, as if they didn't want to upset him.

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, both of them are my toys."

name: Iida
message: "Oh, no, I didn't say anything..."
Numada looked anxious and uncomfortable when Mamiya-kun looked at him. He scratched his head, laughed, and looked down.

name: Megu
message: "How did you know to come here?!"
When she saw Numada back down, she raised her voice and asked Mamiya-kun that question.

name: Mamiya
message: "Well... I just knew, I guess."

name: Mamiya
message: "They're my toys, after all. It's only natural to search for something when it goes missing. Am I wrong?"

name: Megu
message: "Tch, you nasty fucker."

name: Mamiya
message: "I'd say the same about you..."
Megu glared daggers at him, but Mamiya-kun didn't flinch.
Megu is so prideful that she hates people like Mamiya-kun.

name: Mamiya
message: "Anyway, would you refrain from touching my property in the future?"

name: Megu
message: "What?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm saying... I want you all to go away. You're not welcome here."

name: Other School Student
message: "Is this the Mamiya Takuji I heard about?"

name: Iinuma
message: "Yeah... That's right. He kicked our asses when we went after him with like twenty people."

name: Other School Student
message: "Is he that strong? He doesn't look it..."

name: Iinuma
message: "It's ridiculous... He's not normal."

name: Kimika
message: "You dumbass, Mamiya! Quit acting tough. This is serious!"

name: Kimika
message: "And when the hell did I become your toy? Is this some comedy routine? Is this some stand-up routine you came up with?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What are you talking about... You're nothing more than a toy."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Wh-Wh-What?!
I'll fucking kill you!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "M-Mamiya!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, it's been a long time... since I've heard you call me that."

name: Iida
message: "Come on, Shiroyama, haven't you learned your lesson? How many times does he have to kick your ass before you learn?"

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What are you so afraid of, Tsubasa?! He's unarmed, and he's just one guy! Look at how many people you have... A ton of people came today, look."

name: Satoko
message: "Th-That's right! Why are you afraid of him?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Th-That's right... Fuck you, Mamiya! You can't act tough when you don't even have a weapon!"

name: Mamiya
message: "A weapon?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Yeah, that's right... There are fifteen of us here, and we have weapons!"

name: Nishimura
message: "Uh... Wait, what? I only see eleven."

name: Iida
message: "Oh, you're right... There are only eleven."
They started to panic when they realized they were missing four people.

name: Mamiya
message: "You know, I happened to... take care of a few people on my way. And there were a few others that ran when they saw me, you know?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Shut the fuck up! It doesn't matter. There are still plenty of us, and we have weapons. You don't stand a chance."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, weapons... Something like this?"
Mamiya-kun casually pulled a knife out of his pocket and flipped the blade out.

name: Kimika
message: "That's my Extreme Tanto!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Knives are very important items for disgusting nerds like me... You know that, Shiroyama-kun..."

name: Iida
message: "Whoa, this is bad... We can't fight Mamiya-kun. We can't."

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... Oh look, it's just Shiroyama-kun. No one else wants to fight. That's just boring."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then how about this?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wha― Why?!"
Mamiya-kun threw his only weapon into the darkness behind him.

name: Shiroyama
message: "You trying to mock me, you little shit?!"
Unsurprisingly, Shiroyama's eyes lit up with anger, like Mamiya-kun had poured oil on the fire.

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya... That's just reckless!"
Just like Kimika, I had no idea what he was thinking.

name: Nishimura
message: "Heh, this might actually work out."

name: Megu
message: "Then go fuck him up already! It should be easy to take this guy out!"

name: Satoko
message: "Yeah, he doesn't look strong at all."

name: Iida
message: "No... You two can only say that because you've never seen him fight. He threw his knife away because he's confident."

name: Iinuma
message: "No, if we don't get him now, we're just gonna keep getting knocked around by him for the rest of our lives!"

name: Iida
message: "I guess so, but... Hmm."

name: Mamiya
message: "You shouldn't be having a strategic meeting right in front of your enemy. Make up your mind. Are you gonna do it or not..."

name: Megu
message: "You look pathetic. Show us that you have some balls! He's fucking mocking you."

name: Megu
message: "Come on, Tsubasa. Don't take that shit from him!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Y-Yeah! Mamiya, you little fucker!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hurry up... I only have today left. Starting tomorrow, it looks like someone a bit more peaceful is gonna take the role of Mamiya Takuji."
Today? Role? Peaceful? What's he muttering to himself about?

name: Mamiya
message: "Come on, if you want to get revenge on me for all the pain I've inflicted on you, now's your last chance."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Yeah, let's do it! We'll beat you to a fucking pulp!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Then quit acting tough... and come at me―"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Take thiiis!"
Shiroyama swung the wooden sword at Mamiya-kun before he even finished his sentence.

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh!"
The downward slash of the sword carried through and struck the ground.
It was a powerful attack, but it also left him open for a long time after he missed.
Mamiya-kun moved his upper body just enough to dodge the attack, putting him in arm's reach of his opponent.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh!"

name: Mamiya
message: "You need a bit more practice with that. Only an amateur would put his whole body into a single swing."

name: Kimika
message: "No way..."

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Wow..."

name: Mamiya
message: "One must fight to live... It wouldn't hurt you to remember that."
He thrusted his finger into Shiroyama's throat... Shiroyama collapsed on the spot.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh, aahgh... Ah... Gguah, aaogh..."

name: Mamiya
message: "This is a real fight, so I won't aim for any point that won't end the fight instantly."

name: Iida
message: "Look... There's no way we can beat him."

name: Nishimura
message: "Damn it! We have to attack him all at once!"

name: Iida
message: "I'm out... Mamiya-kun, I wasn't planning on fighting you in the first place."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, no problem... So then what about you, Iinuma? Yokoyama?"
Mamiya-kun looked a little disappointed―though still as intimidating as the Devil―as he asked that question.

name: Nishimura
message: "W-Wait, Iinuma! Kiyoshi! You guys are men, aren't you?!"

name: Iinuma
message: "Huh? W-Well, yeah, but..."

name: Nishimura
message: "It'll work if we all go at once... Even Mamiya can't stop us all."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right, you should all attack me at once... What's there to be afraid of when you have all those weapons? Look, I'm totally unarmed."

name: Nishimura
message: "Since you asked so nicely, I'll go ahead and smash your face in!"
The frightened men regained their composure. When they signaled each other to attack―

name: Lowlifes
message: "Aagh!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's Kimika's...?"
Just before he was attacked, he pulled a flashlight from behind him and shined it in their eyes.

name: Mamiya
message: "You really believed I was unarmed? You shouldn't believe everything your opponent tells you."

name: Nishimura
message: "Shit, I can't see... Aaagh!"
I heard a loud crack, and then Nishimura, who was standing closest to Mamiya-kun, fell to the ground, howling in pain.

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Just like that?"
Mamiya-kun only twisted Nishimura's hands lightly, and yet Nishimura went flying through the air.
And it wasn't just Nishimura. One by one, the blinded men were taken out. An unpleasant sound rang through the air every time one of them fell to the ground.

name: Iida
message: "This always happens... Does he study martial arts or what?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah... Something like that."
I was shocked to hear his voice so calm as he cut through his enemies, knocking them to the ground one by one.

name: Mamiya
message: "Looks like the rest of you have your vision back..."

name: Iinuma
message: "Huh?!"
Iinuma couldn't stop himself from yelling in despair.
Mamiya-kun had pulled a sword from somewhere to fight the rest of his opponents. He took a flawless defensive stance as he stood in front of them.

name: Iinuma
message: "W-Wait a second... Is that real? That's not funny..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't worry. It's real, but the blade is too dull to cut anything."

name: Iinuma
message: "Agh!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Look, that didn't hurt at all, did it?"
Mamiya-kun slashed diagonally down onto the terrified Iinuma, knocking him to the ground in an instant.
Even if it doesn't have a blade, hitting someone with forged steel that hard could seriously hurt.
Iinuma's skull might have broken...

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't hold back now. Come get your fill, all of you..."
Mamiya-kun snickered and waved them closer. The men with weapons charged at him, one after another.
I couldn't bear to look at it. I silently looked away.
I could still hear the merciless sound of human bodies being broken...

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? It's over already? All bark and no bite, huh?"
The music of violence came to a stop. When I heard Mamiya-kun's dissatisfaction, I finally turned back toward him.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-This..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I gave Shiroyama my special treatment, but I went easy on all the others."

name: Zakuro
message: "But... they're all covered in blood..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess so. Still, if I didn't do that..."
Mamiya-kun smirked.
His smile sent shivers down my spine.

name: Megu
message: "No... No, no... No way..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Now you two are the only ones left."
Mamiya-kun strode over to the two women who were quivering in fear.
His expression hadn't changed the entire time. The scariest thing of all was that he could do something like this without even cracking his veneer of elegance.

name: Mamiya
message: "Now what should I do with these two..."
He calmly put away his gleaming sword, took one look at the pale faces of Megu and Satoko, and then asked us what he should do with them.

name: Mamiya
message: "I could give them the same treatment as Shiroyama, or I could stuff their noses and mouths full of sticks and beat them to a pulp..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Or maybe stuff sticks in their ears and punch them... Just remember, whichever way you fall, that's the eardrum that will be ruptured."

name: Mamiya
message: "I've never had a chance to do it, but I've always wanted to try playing that game with someone."
...What's going on? He was calm before, but I could see his expression changing now.
It made me feel like he was criticizing himself internally, calling himself useless, even as he fought and crushed all his enemies.
Just looking at him... felt agonizing. I could hardly breathe.

name: Zakuro
message: "No, that's enough."

name: Mamiya
message: "...Takashima."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's enough... You don't need to hurt anyone else."

name: Mamiya
message: "There's... no need?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Then I have a question... Is there ever a good reason for a person to hurt another person?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You've been bullied for years. You know it better than anyone... And you, Tachibana."

name: Kimika
message: "...Mamiya."

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... I lost my cool there, huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, whatever. If you're satisfied, then that's good enough. Oh, and―"
Mamiya-kun turned around like he remembered something. Something small danced across the ground and landed near Kimika's hand.

name: Kimika
message: "My Extreme Tanto..."
That was definitely the same folding knife he stole from Kimika.
But it was open when he threw it away. He must have closed it with his hand as he threw it, since it was shut now.

name: Mamiya
message: "It has our fingerprints on it, so we don't want to leave it laying around."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, yeah."
Kimika slowly reached out and grabbed it, then she put it in her pocket without a second glance.

name: Mamiya
message: "See ya."
He had already turned away from us and started walking when he said his goodbye.
I should have said something back to him, but... I hesitated to say farewell. I just silently watched as his form disappeared into the darkness.

name: Satoko
message: "Ah... Ahhh..."
Megu and Satoko had fallen to the ground. They looked at the two of us, trying and failing to convince their mouths to form words.
They were unharmed themselves, but they were terrified after they watched all the men fighting for them crumple like dolls.

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika, can you stand?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm okay..."

name: Zakuro
message: "All right. Let's go home together."
She looked unsteady on her feet, so I moved closer and wrapped her arm around my shoulders.

name: Kimika
message: "Ooh... I was so powerless..."

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "In the end, I couldn't protect you... I couldn't do anything..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not true... That's not true at all..."
I tried to soothe her as she looked away and cried. I had to stop myself from embracing her right there.
I would probably just hurt her if I hugged her now, since she was injured, and I didn't want to hurt her pride either.
Until now, I've always felt like my life was a living hell, as if I was about to be crushed by my perpetual fear. But now, that's all changed. I've made a wonderful friend.
